_meta.purpose: Demo signals for Scenario A. Trigger the manual webhook with body { "signals_override": true } to use these instead of attempting a live Firecrawl scrape. Lets the digest synthesise from a representative weekly payload that matches MASTER §7's example tone, exactly the way the system would behave on a normal Monday in production.

signals_this_week.headline: New SMB pricing tier launched at €299/month
signals_this_week.evidence: Pricing page now lists a 'Starter' tier at €299/mo for teams under 25 seats — confirmed via direct page diff vs. last week's snapshot. Pigment historically refused to publish SMB pricing.

signals_this_week.headline: 4 new ML Engineer hires on LinkedIn this week
signals_this_week.evidence: LinkedIn shows 4 ML Engineer hires Apr 28–May 2: 2 in Paris, 1 in NYC, 1 remote. Implies meaningful AI product investment alongside the SMB pricing move.

signals_this_week.headline: 3 new G2 reviews this week mention 'easier to implement than Anaplan'
signals_this_week.evidence: All 3 reviews are from Series B SaaS finance teams in our ICP (50–500 employees). Two reference 'Anaplan implementation took 9 months,' one references 'Anaplan consultants quoted €180k'. Sentiment continues to shift on time-to-value.

signals_this_week.headline: New blog: 'FP&A for PE Portfolio Companies'
signals_this_week.evidence: Planful publishing dedicated PE-vertical content for the second week running. Suggests a vertical pivot toward PE portfolio FP&A — outside our core mid-market SaaS ICP.

signals_this_week.headline: No significant signals this week
signals_this_week.evidence: Blog cadence steady, no pricing or product changelog updates, job postings flat. No detectable directional change.

signals_this_week.headline: New webinar series: 'Excel + AI for mid-market CFOs'
signals_this_week.evidence: Featured webinar campaign positions Vena as the 'Excel-native AI' option vs. cloud-native AI competitors. Defensive framing — first time Vena explicitly addresses AI-native pressure.

signals_this_week.headline: 1 G2 review mentions evaluating Vena alongside our product
signals_this_week.evidence: Series B HR SaaS reviewer (350 employees) listed Vena and us as final shortlist. Chose Vena on Microsoft 365 alignment. Worth a follow-up to understand the deciding factor.
